meaning: Public Limited Company,股票上市公司
examples: This cycle is sometimes referred to simply as PLC.
Royal Bank of Scotland PLC said it isn't talking to a bidder.
Allied Irish Banks Plc and Bank of Ireland Plc both sank more than 5 percent.
Shares in Edinburgh-based Cupid Plc, which include cupid.com, benaughty.com and flirt.com, fell by 57% to 49p.
The administrators of Southampton Leisure Holdings PLC remain locked in talks with the Pinnacle Group.
